69cd62bf473d11f1646c2269 description:
Brother, soldier, merc... welcome back to Tarkov, friend. Much has happened since you left. There are many new faces in town. You may have seen some of them in the contacts dossier I gave you. You'll get your chance to meet them in due time.
First, I need you to scout out the old Customs area. Just don't lose your head. We've got a long road ahead of us.
69cd62bf473d11f1646c2269 successMessageT: Two balls, one head. Yup, same you. Thanks for taking a look.
69cd770045b0c8b5f47878a4 description: First things first. We need to clear out the perimeter from some of the less friendly faces in town. Start by taking out 5 of the locals. That should send them running.
69cd770045b0c8b5f47878a4 successMessageT: It's so quiet without all that chatter. I can almost hear myself think.
69cd7b7345b0c8b5f47878ae description:
Now that we have food to eat, beer to drink, and can hear ourselves taking a shit, I've been thinking about this whole Terragroup situation. They corrupt everything they touch, it seems, and Tarkov was no exception.
I need you to check out if these papers I heard about are legit. Heard it through the local wire.
No, dipshit, they don't use Facebook Messenger. They meet face-to-face, like real men. Besides, infrastructure out here is spotty. Just what did you spend your time doing back on the mainland, anyways?
69cd7b7345b0c8b5f47878ae successMessageT: Thanks. Seems legit, though it's barely legible.
69cd7bf545b0c8b5f47878b3 description:
The same guy that told me about those documents has another job for us. Should be straightforward enough. He wants you to merc a few of those mercs that have been bumming around, doesn't care where.
Oh, not funny huh? My bad. Fuck me for trying. Get out there champ.
69cd7bf545b0c8b5f47878b3 successMessageT: Great. Got another number passed along. Said he's got some work for us.
69cd7c9645b0c8b5f47878ba description: You remember sitting by that boat on Shoreline? One of those dismal summer days, bottle of vodka and a pack of smokes? Life doesn't get better than that. I'm not saying we could relive that, but... well, it's worth a shot, isn't it?
69cd7c9645b0c8b5f47878ba successMessageT: Grab the matches. I'll meet you outside in ten.
69cd7d3d45b0c8b5f47878be: Turn in 2 alcohol items in raid
